description: Help us balance the bikes in the network and win free electric rides!
The icy conditions will make travel more difficult. Caution and vigilance are required during outings for all year-round cyclists. The BIXI network remains open.
Please note that new rates will come into effect on Friday, March 1st. Check our website for full details.
75% of the network is available this weekend! Grab your seasonal membership and enjoy the nice weather on your BIXI!
The service is restored to all BIXI stations.
The rapid accumulation of snow will make travel more difficult. Caution and vigilance are required during outings for all year-round cyclists. The BIXI network remains open for essential trips.
The rapid accumulation of snow makes travel more difficult. Caution and vigilance are required during outings for all year-round cyclists. The BIXI network remains open for essential trips.
Up to 25 drop-off stations will be set up from 8 am to 11 pm at busy locations for the next few days. Plan your trips via the app
Your transportation needs are covered thanks to our service enhancement and the 11 additional drop-off stations in high-traffic areas. The BIXI app is the best tool to plan your trips.
